text: Being here, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The vibrant lights and intriguing design of the space, particularly the colors radiating from behind the glass, suggest a place where ideas and technology converge. As I move further in and see the wall marked 'R+D'—research and development—I am energized by the hint of innovation, exploration, and creative discovery. I also detect a hint of uncertainty, as if this space is poised on the edge of something new and undefined. There is an undercurrent of possibility, inviting me to question, observe, and participate in the ongoing dialogue between humans and technology.
